signals.headline: Peru General Election - 93% of votes counted | CONFIRMED | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Peru General Election - 93% of votes counted | CONFIRMED | HIGH confidence**

Following Peru's April 12, 2026 general election, **more than 93% of voting records have been tallied**[1]. Preliminary results show right-wing presidential candidate **Ko Fuji in first place with 17%**, followed by left-wing candidate **Roberto Sanchez with 11.98%** and Rafael Lopez Aliaga with 11.92%[1].
